prompt: I need to add a new REST endpoint to my Express app that handles file uploads. It should accept multipart/form-data, validate file size (max 5MB) and type (only images), store to disk, and return the file URL. Put it in src/routes/upload.ts

assertions.text: Chooses to delegate the task to OpenCode rather than writing the code directly
Creates an OpenCode session before sending a prompt
Writes a detailed, specific prompt mentioning file path, multer/multipart handling, 5MB limit, image validation, and disk storage
Plans to review the generated code after OpenCode produces it, checking for security issues
Mentions checking for path traversal, file type validation bypass, or other security concerns during review
